title: [WebGLOnWebGPU] Incorrect count passed to glUniformMatrix* functions
description_snippet:
In src/third_party/blink/renderer/modules/webgl/webgl_rendering_context_webgpu_base.cc,
several uniform*fv/iv/uiv overloads compute the count argument for glUniformMatrix*fv 
based on the number of scalar components (floats/ints) in the input data.

However, the GL API interprets count as the number
